OpenSearchDescription.LongName: Search 22 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents
OpenSearchDescription.Description: Search the melis x402 Tools catalogue — scrape, validate, embed, store, moderate, notify, convert, RAG, agent memory. USDC on Base, no accounts.
OpenSearchDescription.Tags: x402 mcp ai-agents pay-per-call usdc base llm-tools rag embeddings
